hero.title: A cleaner way to download media.
hero.desc: Paste a link, pick a format, let AetherLens handle the rest. Electron + yt-dlp under the hood, a proper queue on the surface.

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.title: Grab the installer
downloads.desc: Pulled from the latest GitHub release. Pick your OS.

features.label: Features
features.title: What it does
features.desc: URL analysis, format picking, queue management — no terminal needed.
features.metadataDesc: See title, duration, and available formats before downloading anything.
features.formatDesc: Pick audio or video profiles — no guessing, no re-downloads.
features.playlistDesc: Select specific items from channels and playlists instead of grabbing everything.
features.queueDesc: Pause, resume, retry, or cancel — everything lives in one screen.
features.wizardDesc: First-run flow handles dependencies so you don't touch a terminal.
features.historyDesc: Past downloads and preferences stick around between sessions.

screenshots.label: Preview
screenshots.title: What you're installing
screenshots.homeCaption: Home — paste a URL, see metadata, download.
screenshots.formatCaption: Format picker — choose codec, resolution, container.
screenshots.playlistCaption: Playlist selector — pick items from a batch.
screenshots.queueCaption: Queue — progress, pause, retry, all in one place.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: Four steps, start to finish
workflow.step1Desc: Run the installer, follow the setup wizard.
workflow.step2Desc: Drop a URL — metadata and formats load automatically.
workflow.step3Desc: Set format, quality, and output folder.
workflow.step4Desc: Hit go. Track progress in the queue.

footer.warning: You may see a signing warning on first launch — the app is open-source and not commercially code-signed. On Windows click More info → Run anyway, on macOS use System Settings → Open Anyway.

modal.title: About installer warnings
modal.body: Your download has started. Windows and macOS may show a trust warning because AetherLens isn't commercially code-signed — that's a signing cost thing, not a safety issue.
modal.check1: Only use links from this page or official GitHub releases.
modal.check2: Compare release tags and commits in the repo.
modal.check3: Read the source if you want full confidence.
